title: Troty Energy Research Facility
body:
# Requires Resource Pack:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/troty-energy-research-facility-resource-pack

Troty Energy Research Facility (T.E.R.F) is currently the biggest minecraft technology datapack focusing mainly on nuclear science featuring:
- Power & Fluid system with pipes & wires
- 60+ Custom Multiblock Structures
- 20+ Custom Tools & Weapons
- 30+ Advancements
- New crafting recipes
- Ore farms
- Radiation system
- Space stations
- Oxygen mechanic
- Vehicles
- Hundreds of custom items like plates,wires and electronic parts used for microcrafting

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xSj-P4XRNwI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Vanilla Changes:
1. **Warning: This datapack overrides:**
- Every Glazed Terracotta
- Iron Chains
- Non-Waxed Oxidized Copper Chains
- Non-Polished Granite slabs, stairs and walls
- Non-Polished Andesite stairs
- Petrified oak slabs
- And Acacia Signs
for it's custom blocks, **it is not recommended to insert this datapack to an already existing world, or a world with Terralith or other world generation & structure datapacks**.

2. This datapack currently removes trial chamber generation as copper is an essential part of the playthrough
3. Ender pearl stasis chambers explode (As the datapack adds new ways)

## Configs:
You can open the datapack and go into data/terf/functions and edit config.mcfunction, then run `/reload`
